security.csp: default-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; connect-src 'self' https://api.binance.com https://fapi.binance.com https://generativelanguage.googleapis.com; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval' https://s3.tradingview.com; img-src 'self' data: https:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'

bundle.shortDescription: Deterministic crypto analysis — local, offline, no cloud
bundle.longDescription: Sentinel is a desktop application for real-time cryptocurrency market analysis. It runs a multi-module analysis engine locally, combining technical indicators, market structure, volume analysis, support and resistance levels, confidence scoring, and optional AI narrative to provide comprehensive trading insights — with no backend server required.
